critical.label: Critical Issues
critical.legend: These are safety, security, life-threatening issues for TVS Emerald Aaranya Residents. These demand immediate and urgent action.

high.label: High Priority
high.legend: Significant issues affecting community infrastructure, aesthetics, hygiene, and resident well-being. These require prompt attention and resolution.

request.label: New Requests
request.legend: New community improvement requests and enhancements raised by residents for consideration and planning.

issues.title: CTO Renewal & Handover
issues.subtitle: Association Registration and Handover from TVS
issues.problem: CTO Renewal, Association Registration and handover from TVS Emerald to the Residents' Association has not been completed. This is a fundamental prerequisite for the community to operate independently.
fix: Complete CTO renewal process immediately.
Facilitate Association Registration and formal handover of community management.
issues.traceability: Not previously raised in formal emails. New issue surfaced in Apr 2026 presentation.

issues.title: Heavy Vehicle Movement
issues.subtitle: Lifestyle Construction Vehicles Inside Community
issues.problem: Heavy construction vehicles from Lifestyle project are using community internal roads, causing damage to roads, safety hazard for residents and children, and noise/dust pollution throughout the day.
fix: Stop all heavy vehicle movement inside community roads immediately.
Designate an alternate route for construction vehicles outside the community perimeter.
issues.traceability: Raised in Jul 14 email (restriction on heavy vehicles). Tracker item #26: TVS claimed 'roads already gifted' — marked Not Within Scope. REVERSAL: roads damaged by TVS's own construction traffic.

issues.title: Drainage Blockage
issues.subtitle: Stormwater Drains Blocked by Construction Debris
issues.problem: Stormwater drains in spine road and all internal roads are blocked due to excessive construction debris and rubbish from TVS construction activity. Shuttering laid during drain construction has not been removed from inside.
fix: Clean the complete storm water drain system end-to-end — not just chambers.
Remove all construction debris and embedded shuttering.
Conduct a preventive drainage audit across all TVS construction areas.
issues.traceability: Raised in Jul 14 and Aug 12 emails. Tracker item #3: TVS response 'routine maintenance, cost deducted from maintenance charges' — Timeline 07-05-2026.

issues.title: Man-made Pond Hazard
issues.subtitle: Snake-Prone Zone & Seasonal Drying
issues.problem: High snake-prone zone — during monsoon, snakes are driven through drains and hide/breed in rock gaps. During summer, the pond dries up completely as groundwater depletes making it unusable.
fix: Plaster gaps or complete new brickwork with smooth surface to stop snake harboring.
Concrete the open ground to maintain water levels.
Connect storm water drain to closed drain system to prevent snake entry.
issues.traceability: Raised in Aug 12 email. Tracker item #7: TVS response 'debris clearing as maintenance' — Timeline 21-04-2026. Civil rework (plastering, brickwork) not committed by TVS.

issues.title: Perimeter Wall Height
issues.subtitle: Prone to Security Breach — Trespasser Risk
issues.problem: Height of the entire community perimeter wall is too short and prone to security breach. Trespassers can easily enter and jump into the community. Barbed wire is missing in most sections.
fix: Ensure 6 feet compound wall clearance from both inside and outside.
Install barbed wire across the entire perimeter — mandatory for all walls.
Audit and fix all vulnerable perimeter sections.
issues.traceability: Raised since Jul 14, 2025 — first email. Escalated repeatedly. Tracker item #9: TVS response 'To be deliberated' — REVERSAL FLAG. After 9 months and 40+ owners visiting corporate office, still no commitment.

issues.title: Stray Dogs & Pool Safety
issues.subtitle: OSR, Clubhouse & Swimming Pool Intrusion
issues.problem: Stray dogs enter through picket fencing into OSR areas, Clubhouse and swimming pool. Dog-chasing incidents in OSR 1 reported multiple times. Pool barricade height inadequate for privacy (especially women swimmers) and dogs jump through to drink pool water.
fix: Install PVC/equivalent mesh fencing on all picket fences: OSR 1, 2, 3 and Clubhouse.
Install 8 feet barricading around swimming pool as agreed.
Ensure all barriers prevent dog, cattle, and reptile entry.
issues.traceability: Raised since Jul 14, 2025. Tracker #12: PVC mesh scheduled 07-05-2026. Tracker #16: 8ft pool barricading — REVERSAL FLAG — TVS claims 'beyond our scope' despite it being agreed in a prior meeting.

issues.title: Soil Pile-up & Low Wall
issues.subtitle: Phase 3 Boundary — Security & Flooding Risk
issues.problem: Basement soil piled up near Phase 3 with inadequate compound wall height. Trespassers and stray dogs can jump in. A trespasser incident already occurred. Adjacent higher latitude roads pose flooding risk during monsoon.
fix: Remove soil dump completely to restore natural soil level.
Re-assess compound wall elevations post-removal.
issues.traceability: Raised in Aug 12 email. Tracker #8: soil disposal by 17-04-2026. Tracker #23: soil dump removal by 21-04-2026.

issues.title: Compound Wall Gap
issues.subtitle: Near Pond — Locals Entering for Fishing
issues.problem: Compound wall gap near pond area remains open and unsecured. Localities already entering the pond for fishing — a direct safety concern.
fix: Construct 6 feet compound wall to close the gap completely.
issues.traceability: Raised in Aug 12 email. Tracker #24: TVS response 'debris clearing initiated' — Timeline 19-04-2026. 6ft wall construction not committed.

issues.title: Dead Spot — Street Lights
issues.subtitle: Between Udanya Phase 1 & Phase 2
issues.problem: Street lighting between Udanya Phase 1 and Phase 2 is missing, creating a dangerous dead spot during nights.
fix: Install 2 street lights between Udanya Phase 1 and Phase 2 common space.
issues.traceability: New issue raised in Apr 2026 presentation. Not previously in formal email correspondence.

issues.title: Construction Debris Dump
issues.subtitle: Between Udanya Phase 1 & Phase 2
issues.problem: Space between Udanya Phase 1 and Phase 2 is filled with rubbish and construction material. Area frequently becomes a garbage dump creating unhygienic conditions.
fix: Move rubbish and construction material inside construction zone.
Landscape the area or install paver blocks.
issues.traceability: New issue raised in Apr 2026 presentation. Not previously in formal email correspondence.

issues.title: OSR 1 Safety Hazard
issues.subtitle: Construction Rubbish & Unmaintained Bushes
issues.problem: Empty container and construction rubbish in front of OSR 1 with unmaintained bushes — safety and security concern for children.
fix: Remove empty container and all construction rubbish from OSR 1 vicinity.
Move materials to construction zone.
issues.traceability: OSR 1 maintenance raised in Aug 12 email as MyGate complaint with no action. Construction rubbish aspect is new in Apr 2026 presentation.

issues.title: Missing Paver Blocks
issues.subtitle: Cherry, Kurinji, Ashoka Streets
issues.problem: Open spots next to walkways lack paver block installation, causing pest and reptile breeding conditions.
fix: Install paver blocks in all unpaved walkway-adjacent areas to prevent snake/reptile breeding.
issues.traceability: Raised in Aug 12 email. Tracker #10 and #13: paver blocks refill scheduled 22-04-2026.

issues.title: Clubhouse Electrical
issues.subtitle: Broken Lights & Exposed Junctions
issues.problem: Clubhouse terrace has broken lights and open exposed electrical junctions in outer terrace ceilings — safety hazard.
fix: Fix all broken light fittings.
Repair all exposed electrical junction issues.
issues.traceability: New issue raised in Apr 2026 presentation. Not previously in formal email correspondence.

issues.title: Cherry St. Garden Damage
issues.subtitle: Construction Damage & Exposed Cables
issues.problem: Cherry Street garden between Udanya Phase 2 and main entrance is completely damaged due to apartment compound wall work. Electrical cables for street lights are dangerously exposed.
fix: Recable street light electrical lines with proper safety.
Remove debris and restore pathway garden with red soil and replanting.
issues.traceability: Raised in Aug 12 email. Tracker #15: 'Cherry Street maintenance as per schedule' — Timeline 21-04-2026.

issues.title: OSR Gate Retrofit
issues.subtitle: Auto-Close Gates Required
issues.problem: All OSR gates remain open allowing cattle and dog entry. OSR 1 northern side needs additional access near Kukum Street for Phase 2 residents.
fix: Replace all OSR gates with spring/rotary auto-close gates.
Add one additional rotary gate at OSR 1 near Kukum Street.
issues.traceability: Raised since Jul 14, 2025. Tracker #27: REVERSAL FLAG — 'not committed, not in scope'. Tracker #28 (OSR 2): also Not Within Scope. Recurring ask over 9 months, now formally rejected by TVS.

issues.title: Debris Near EB Station
issues.subtitle: Kokum Street — Open Chamber & Bushes
issues.problem: Construction debris near EB station in Kokum Street. Open EB chamber and unmaintained bushes encourage snake and reptile breeding.
fix: Clear construction debris.
Close open EB chamber.
Clear unmaintained bushes.
issues.traceability: New issue raised in Apr 2026 presentation.

issues.title: Open Electrical Boards
issues.subtitle: Clubhouse Safety Concern
issues.problem: Open main boards and electric boards in the clubhouse are unfixed, posing a safety risk to residents and staff.
fix: Secure and fix all open electrical boards in the clubhouse.
issues.traceability: New issue raised in Apr 2026 presentation.

issues.title: Access Card — Terrace
issues.subtitle: Incomplete Facility in Clubhouse
issues.problem: Access card facility for the Clubhouse terrace is incomplete and non-functional.
fix: Complete access card installation for Clubhouse terrace.
issues.traceability: Biometric/access card for Clubhouse mentioned in Aug 12 email amenities list.

issues.title: Missing CCTV
issues.subtitle: Clubhouse Terrace
issues.problem: Existing CCTV camera on the clubhouse terrace is missing — security gap.
fix: Reinstall CCTV on clubhouse terrace immediately.
issues.traceability: New issue raised in Apr 2026 presentation.

issues.title: Open Chamber Hazard
issues.subtitle: Amla & Cherry St. Junction Footpath
issues.problem: Open chamber with construction debris on the footpath at Amla and Cherry Street junction — serious safety concern for children.
fix: Close the chamber properly.
Clear construction material from the footpath.
issues.traceability: New issue raised in Apr 2026 presentation.

issues.title: Speed Breaker Needed
issues.subtitle: Apple / Paradise Street Junction
issues.problem: Vehicles from Apple Street enter Paradise Street at high speeds — safety concern for pedestrians and children.
fix: Install speed breaker at Apple / Paradise Street junction.
issues.traceability: New issue raised in Apr 2026 presentation.

issues.title: Peripheral Wall — Outer
issues.subtitle: Missing Plastering Near Phase 3
issues.problem: Peripheral wall outer surface lacks plastering, risking wall collapse and dampness during monsoon. Degrades community aesthetics.
fix: Complete plastering near Phase 3 and wherever required.
issues.traceability: New issue raised in Apr 2026 presentation.

issues.title: Peripheral Wall — Paint
issues.subtitle: Phase 3 Inner Side Incomplete
issues.problem: Inner side of peripheral wall in Phase 3 is missing painting, degrading community aesthetics.
fix: Complete painting on all peripheral walls near Phase 3 and wherever required.
issues.traceability: New issue raised in Apr 2026 presentation.

issues.title: Road Quality Issues
issues.subtitle: Water Stagnation in Multiple Streets
issues.problem: Uneven road surfaces causing water stagnation in Paradise, Berry, Amla, Pungam, and Kurinji Streets.
fix: Resurface and level roads in affected streets to eliminate water stagnation.
issues.traceability: Road damage raised from Jul 14 email onwards. Nov 4 email specifically about entrance road flooding. Tracker #11: 'Main spine road repair — To be confirmed'.

issues.title: OSR 3 Dead Spot
issues.subtitle: Missing Night Lighting
issues.problem: OSR 3 is a dead spot during nights with no lighting installed — safety hazard.
fix: Install OSR lights in OSR 3 immediately.
issues.traceability: OSR 3 maintenance (non-working lights) raised in Aug 12 email. Tracker #22: 'OSR 3 near Phase 3 will be completed as per plan' — Timeline 27-04-2026.

issues.title: Amla Street Damage
issues.subtitle: Debris, Open Wiring & Road Damage
issues.problem: Amla Street is unmaintained with construction debris, open wiring, and heavily damaged roads due to Phase 3 construction works.
fix: Clear Amla Street of debris.
Fix damaged roads.
Secure all open wiring.
issues.traceability: Tracker #14: 'Amla Street maintenance — materials relocated for safety' — Timeline 14-04-2026.

issues.title: Community Store Room
issues.subtitle: Storage Facility Request
issues.problem: No dedicated store room for the community. Currently, STP basement is used for dumping excess construction materials — unhygienic and unsafe.
fix: Provide temporary structure-based community store for tools, equipment, and maintenance materials.
issues.traceability: New issue raised in Apr 2026 presentation.

issues.title: Clubhouse Wall Cracks
issues.subtitle: Seepage & Dampness Issues
issues.problem: Clubhouse has multiple external and internal wall settlement cracks causing water seepage and dampness.
fix: Attend to all external and internal wall cracks.
Complete repainting of affected areas.
issues.traceability: New issue raised in Apr 2026 presentation.

issues.title: OSR 3 Material Dump
issues.subtitle: Construction Materials in Park
issues.problem: Construction material has been dumped inside OSR 3 — a recreational area for residents.
fix: Move all construction material from OSR 3 to store room or construction site.
issues.traceability: New issue raised in Apr 2026 presentation.

issues.title: TVS Canteen Clutter
issues.subtitle: Shenbaga Street — Snake Hazard
issues.problem: Existing TVS canteen in Shenbaga Street is extremely cluttered, encouraging snakes and reptiles to sneak in.
fix: Move the canteen away from the area.
Clean and landscape the OSR area with minimal landscaping.
issues.traceability: New issue raised in Apr 2026 presentation.

issues.title: Open Hanging Wiring
issues.subtitle: Clubhouse to Kukum & Ashoka Streets
issues.problem: Open electrical hanging wiring between Clubhouse and Kukum Street, and in Ashoka Street. Temp electrical main board used for labour accommodation needs removal.
fix: Remove all open wiring.
Remove temp main board in Ashoka Street.
Provide clarity on power utilisation.
issues.traceability: New issue raised in Apr 2026 presentation.

issues.title: Western Side Street Lights
issues.subtitle: Paradise Street
issues.problem: Western side of Paradise Street is quite dark at night due to missing street lights — safety concern.
fix: Install at least 4 street lights on the western side of Paradise Street.

issues.title: Flag Post Installation
issues.subtitle: Patriotic Symbol for Community
issues.problem: No flag post exists in the community. A mandatory patriotic symbol is needed.
fix: Install a flag post in OSR 1.

issues.title: Permanent Staircase
issues.subtitle: Clubhouse Headroom & Tank Access
issues.problem: No permanent staircase for Clubhouse headroom and overhead tank access — maintenance is difficult and unsafe.
fix: Construct a permanent staircase for Clubhouse headroom and overhead tank access.

issues.title: STP/WTP Ventilation
issues.subtitle: Clubhouse Basement
issues.problem: Lack of proper ventilation for STP and WTP in Clubhouse basement — health and safety concern for maintenance staff.
fix: Install proper ventilation system for STP and WTP in Clubhouse basement.

issues.title: Common Restrooms
issues.subtitle: For FM & Community Helpers
issues.problem: Request to retain existing common restrooms container placed near STP for community FM and helpers.
fix: Retain the existing restrooms container near STP for community staff use.

issues.title: Drip Watering System
issues.subtitle: OSR Areas
issues.problem: No drip watering system exists for OSR landscaping — manual watering is inefficient and wasteful.
fix: Install drip watering system in all OSR areas wherever possible.

issues.title: Fire Extinguishers
issues.subtitle: Clubhouse, STP & WTP
issues.problem: No fire extinguishers at floor level in Clubhouse, STP, and WTP — violates basic safety and security standards.
fix: Install at least one fire extinguisher at floor level in Clubhouse, STP, and WTP.

issues.title: Udanya Staircase Access
issues.subtitle: Clubhouse Access Issue
issues.problem: Clubhouse Udanya staircase access issue — needs clarity and resolution.
fix: Provide clarity on staircase access issue and resolve.

issues.title: Fresh Water Lines in OSR
issues.subtitle: For Community Events
issues.problem: No fresh water lines available in OSR 1, 2, or 3 for domestic use during community events.
fix: Provide at least one fresh water line in OSR 1, OSR 2, and OSR 3 for domestic use.

issues.title: Main Entrance Speed Breaker
issues.subtitle: Paradise Street Curve
issues.problem: TVS Aaranya main entrance junction curve sees rash vehicle movement — safety hazard for pedestrians.
fix: Install speed breaker at the main entrance junction curve on Paradise Street.
